description_long: This object consists of a rounded, matte-finished planter or urn set atop a square pedestal base, both rendered in a dark bluish-gray color. The planter is filled with a dense cluster of large, layered purple flowers, each with multiple overlapping petals arranged in a whorled pattern, giving a lush and voluminous appearance. The flowers are tightly packed, almost overflowing the rim of the planter, with a few small, green leaves peeking out from beneath the blossoms. The base is solid and geometric, providing a stable foundation for the more organic, vibrant upper portion. The overall look is ornamental and well-maintained, suitable for placement in urban parks, plazas, or along sidewalks. The combination of the sturdy base and the vivid floral display creates a striking contrast between the hard, architectural lines and the soft, natural forms.
description: A dark, rounded planter on a square pedestal base, overflowing with lush, layered purple flowers and a few green leaves. The arrangement is dense and ornamental, ideal for urban decorative use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded planter filled with purple flowers, with the left side of the floral cluster slightly more prominent.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the right side of the planter and a fuller display of the flower cluster.
description_view_2: Rear view with the densest part of the flower cluster visible, and the base appearing symmetrical.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, but with the left side of the flower cluster more visible and the base clearly defined.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled configuration, with multiple layers of overlapping petals radiating symmetrically around the center of each flower, creating a full and rounded appearance.
